steps.t: The idols of the Angmarim can be found in the three southern bails of Himbar, west of Gath Forthnír. Areneth has directed you into each of the three l…
Araneth is at Gath Forthnír, west of Himbar. Having destroyed the idols in Himbar, return to Gath Forthnír and tell Areneth what you have accomplished…
